## Use Case

<!-- What EVE Frontier scenario, trust decision, or operator workflow does this enable or improve?
Frame this around the trust model: who is the operator/tool, what decision are they trying to make, what evidence do they need? -->

## Affected Layer(s)

- [ ] Protocol (Move modules — attestation, oracle, gate, vouch, lending logic)
- [ ] Indexer / API (Rust — new endpoints, query projections, freshness model)
- [ ] Frontend (React/Vite — operator console UI)
- [ ] SDK / TrustKit (TypeScript — client-facing API surface)
- [ ] Scripts / tooling
- [ ] Documentation / ADR

- Any new on-chain objects, events, or Move module changes
- Any new API endpoints or changes to existing contracts
- Any tenant policy or gate policy implications
- Whether this requires a new ADR -->

## Alternatives Considered

<!-- What other approaches did you consider? Why is your proposed solution better for this use case? -->

## ADR Required?

- [ ] Yes — this change affects attestation schemas, oracle registry, trust scoring, gate policy, or killmail evidence model
- [ ] No — this is an additive change with no trust model impact
